plugin.name: wayfire-curtain-peek
plugin._long: Split the screen down the middle and slide both halves aside to reveal the desktop.

option.name: dismiss
option._long: Optional secondary binding that only closes the curtain. Unset by default so it does not conflict with other plugins that consume Escape.

option.name: backdrop_color
option._long: Flat colour shown behind the lumen-desktop grid once the wallpaper splits away. Defaults to a GNOME-Shell-like grey.
